title: Navigation Integrity & Type-Safe Routes
objective: Verify that all app screens are navigable through the centralized NavGraph and that the navigation graph represents the intended application structure.

steps.expected_result: Screen sealed class contains all feature routes and no hardcoded strings are used elsewhere.
NavGraph defines the complete application flow using the Screen sealed class.
MainActivity is clean and only instantiates NavGraph.

steps.step: Run the app and navigate Dashboard -> Settings -> Categories -> Back
steps.expected_result: Navigation is smooth and back-stack is maintained correctly.
